title: Phones Mod
description: Add modern phones with camera to your minecraft world!
body:
# Add phones to your minecraft world!

- This mod adds phones to your world. Every phone has a camera.
- Every phone is craftable in survival!


<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
### Samsung S24
![Samsung S24](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5324963b128d1aad790aae3b7805074cfc9d01f4.png)

### iPhone 15
![iPhone 15](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d2dfe979e9759394a565ffc69cbe1f212f8533a.png)

### Xiaomi 14
![Xiaomi 14](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813abaf6eb04314fc0430bd38602b0ad759cf6f3.png)
</details>

## **If you want your custom phone in minecraft, join my Discord server!**
